results.details: DB connected (853ms ping), Memory 77%, Status: healthy
User created successfully with tenant role. Welcome notification created.
CSRF-based login successful. Session established with correct user data.

nonIssuesClarified: Logout returns 302, not 200 — This is expected NextAuth v5 behavior (redirect after signout). NOT a bug.
Property/Tenant/Payment creation returns 403 for tenant role — This is correct RBAC. Only admin/manager roles can create these resources.
Maintenance/Booking creation returns 400 — These are validation constraints rejecting undefined required fields. NOT a bug.
Health check may return 503 'degraded' — This happens when memory > 90%. DB remains connected. The health endpoint correctly reports status.
